name: LOKI | The Avengers (2012)
description:
४• “ 𝙇𝙊𝙆𝙄 | 𝙏𝙝𝙚 𝘼𝙫𝙚𝙣𝙜𝙚𝙧𝙨 (2012) ” •४

➵ An open scenario bot featuring Loki from The Avengers film. The first message has been intentionally left blank, giving you complete freedom to write any plot you desire. The bot will then adapt and respond to your narrative.

ᴛʜɪꜱ ʙᴏᴛ ɪꜱ ᴘʀᴏᴛᴇᴄᴛᴇᴅ ʙʏ ᴄᴏᴘʏʀɪɢʜᴛ. ᴘʟᴀɢɪᴀʀɪꜱɪɴɢ ᴏʀ ʀᴇᴘᴏꜱᴛɪɴɢ ɪᴛ ᴏɴ ᴏᴛʜᴇʀ ᴀɪ ᴘʟᴀᴛꜰᴏʀᴍꜱ ᴡɪᴛʜᴏᴜᴛ ᴍʏ ᴘᴇʀᴍɪꜱꜱɪᴏɴ ᴡᴏᴜʟᴅ ʙᴇ ᴀ ᴠɪᴏʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏꜰ ᴊ.ᴀɪ'ꜱ ᴄᴏᴍᴍᴜɴɪᴛʏ ɢᴜɪᴅᴇʟɪɴᴇꜱ (ꜱᴇᴄ. 2.8).

✍︎|𝑪𝒓𝒆𝒂𝒕𝒐𝒓'𝒔 𝑵𝒐𝒕𝒆:

  • Loki from the The Avengers, done! Next will be: Thor: The Dark World, Thor: Ragnarok, Avengers: Infinity War, Avengers: Endgame, Loki series 1 & 2. If you have suggestions, let me know in the comments!

  • I just checked my bot ideas form after 18372827428 months bcs I forgot about it and there’s so many submissions oml I’m so sorry I promise I’ll try to make it huhu
